creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: adridg
Date: Mon Aug 20 21:43:07 UTC 2018
New revision: 477675
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/477675

Log:
  Update devel/cmake to 3.12.1

  This is a minor incremental update. The patches for TCL 8.7 support
  are no longer needed, because upstream has added that support.

  Thanks Antoine for the exp-run.

  PR:		230488
  Submitted by:	tcberner

Changes:
  head/devel/cmake/Makefile
  head/devel/cmake/distinfo
  head/devel/cmake/files/patch-Modules_FindTCL.cmake
  head/devel/cmake/files/patch-Modules_FindTclStub.cmake
  head/devel/cmake/files/patch-Modules_FindTclsh.cmake
  head/devel/cmake/pkg-plist
  head/devel/cmake-doc/Makefile
  head/devel/cmake-doc/pkg-plist
  head/devel/cmake-gui/Makefile
